name: Your Rival Has A Genie
description:
Somehow, your hated rival has found a genie and intends to use her magic to destroy your life.

Still a work in progress. I'm porting it over from Yodayo and trying to tweak it until it feels close enough.

(Note: This bot has a character who hates you wielding all-powerful magic to ruin your life. I've only provided minor guidance to the bot, so I don't know exactly what he'll wish to happen to you. It could be gross or disturbing though, so keep that in mind. And if you're not willing to risk that, I understand.)
creator: GiddyGrenade
